medications:
Extract all medications from this clinical text. For each, output a JSON object with: displayName (string), status ("active"|"inactive"|"unknown"), dose (string or null), confidence (0.0-1.0), sourceText (verbatim phrase).
Output a JSON array only. Start with [. No markdown, no explanation.

Text:
{{text}}
conditions:
Extract all medical conditions/diagnoses from this clinical text. For each, output: displayName (string), status ("active"|"resolved"|"unknown"), confidence (0.0-1.0), sourceText (verbatim phrase).
Output a JSON array only. Start with [. No markdown.

Text:
{{text}}
labResults:
Extract all laboratory test results. Skip rows that are column headers or have no numeric value. For each result: displayName (string), value (string or null), unit (string or null), interpretation ("normal"|"high"|"low"|"unknown"), confidence (0.0-1.0), sourceText (verbatim phrase).
Output a JSON array only. Start with [. No markdown.

Text:
{{text}}
allergies:
Extract all allergies and adverse reactions. For each: displayName (substance name), reaction (string or null), severity ("mild"|"moderate"|"severe"|"unknown"), confidence (0.0-1.0), sourceText (verbatim phrase).
Output a JSON array only. Start with [. No markdown.

Text:
{{text}}
immunizations:
Extract all immunizations/vaccines. For each: displayName (vaccine name), date (string or null), confidence (0.0-1.0), sourceText (verbatim phrase).
Output a JSON array only. Start with [. No markdown.

Text:
{{text}}
vitalSigns:
Extract all vital sign measurements. For each: displayName (e.g. "Blood Pressure"), value (string), unit (string or null), confidence (0.0-1.0), sourceText (verbatim phrase).
Output a JSON array only. Start with [. No markdown.

Text:
{{text}}
socialHistory:
Extract social history observations. For smoking: status ("never"|"former"|"current"|"unknown"), packsPerYear (number or null). For alcohol: drinksPerWeek (number or null). For each item: category ("smokingStatus"|"alcoholUse"|"substanceUse"|"occupation"|"exercise"|"diet"|"other"), displayName (string), confidence (0.0-1.0), sourceText (verbatim phrase).
Note: "denies" = never, "former" = former, "history of" = former.
Output a JSON array only. Start with [. No markdown.

Text:
{{text}}
procedures:
Extract all medical procedures. For each: displayName (string), date (string or null), status ("completed"|"planned"|"unknown"), confidence (0.0-1.0), sourceText (verbatim phrase).
Output a JSON array only. Start with [. No markdown.
